tools.name: http_get
tools.description: Makes an HTTP GET request to the specified URL. Use this to retrieve data from an API or web server.

inputSchema.description: Parameters for making a GET request.

url.description: URL to send GET request to
url.title: Url

headers.description: Optional HTTP headers to include in the request as a JSON object
headers.title: Headers

params.description: Optional query parameters to include in the request as a JSON object
params.title: Params

inputSchema.title: GetRequest

tools.name: http_post
tools.description: Makes an HTTP POST request to the specified URL with an optional body. Use this to create new resources or submit data to an API.

inputSchema.description: Parameters for making a POST request.

url.description: URL to send POST request to
url.title: Url

headers.description: Optional HTTP headers to include in the request as a JSON object
headers.title: Headers

body.description: Optional request body. Can be a JSON object or a string. If a dict is provided, it will be sent as JSON
body.title: Body

inputSchema.title: PostRequest

tools.name: http_put
tools.description: Makes an HTTP PUT request to the specified URL with an optional body. Use this to update or replace existing resources in an API.

inputSchema.description: Parameters for making a PUT request.

url.description: URL to send PUT request to
url.title: Url

headers.description: Optional HTTP headers to include in the request as a JSON object
headers.title: Headers

body.description: Optional request body. Can be a JSON object or a string. If a dict is provided, it will be sent as JSON
body.title: Body

inputSchema.title: PutRequest

tools.name: http_patch
tools.description: Makes an HTTP PATCH request to the specified URL with an optional body. Use this to partially update existing resources in an API.

inputSchema.description: Parameters for making a PATCH request.

url.description: URL to send PATCH request to
url.title: Url

headers.description: Optional HTTP headers to include in the request as a JSON object
headers.title: Headers

body.description: Optional request body. Can be a JSON object or a string. If a dict is provided, it will be sent as JSON
body.title: Body

inputSchema.title: PatchRequest

tools.name: http_delete
tools.description: Makes an HTTP DELETE request to the specified URL. Use this to delete resources from an API.

inputSchema.description: Parameters for making a DELETE request.

url.description: URL to send DELETE request to
url.title: Url

headers.description: Optional HTTP headers to include in the request as a JSON object
headers.title: Headers

inputSchema.title: DeleteRequest
